items.title: Promise lifecycle
items.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Pending: start async work
  Pending --> Fulfilled: resolve(value)
  Pending --> Rejected: reject(error)
  Fulfilled --> [*]: .then / await value
  Rejected --> [*]: .catch / try-catch
  note right of Pending
    Settles exactly once,
    then never changes
  end note
items.caption: A Promise starts pending and settles exactly once as fulfilled or rejected; await reads the value or throws the error.
